flags.message: Stale snapshot for a forward cell: the provisioned snapshot (dated 2026-07-16, internal creation date 03/24/2026) shows no docket activity after the Feb 2, 2026 call for a response (BIO due Mar 4, 2026), five-plus months before the run date. The petition has almost certainly progressed since (BIO, redistribution, possibly a disposition before the summer recess). I did not fetch the live docket, since with that gap a lookup would most likely surface this case's own disposition; the prediction rests on the record as of early February 2026. No outcome-revealing material was encountered.
